title: Revenge of the Musketeers
overview: It is 1654, in the South of France. When horsemen follow a runaway slave into the convent where he's taken sanctuary and kill both the fugitive and the Mother Superior, they little realise that one of the novices is the spirited daughter of retired musketeer D'Artagnan.

trailers.title: La fille de d'Artagnan ( 1994 - bande annonce )
